vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. P1 (Yellow Pot) is empty/barren. P2/P4 (Black Pot) shows a single, struggling leaf. P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) has lost its primary foliage. The registry is largely invalidated by the current state of the specimens.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Pothos foliage absent, rabbit anchor remains)

plant_audit.P1: No plant matter detected. Soil appears dry and undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: No mint or silver guest detected. Pot is effectively fallow.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos foliage has vanished. Only the white rabbit anchor remains in the pot.
plant_audit.P4: A single, chlorotic, lanceolate leaf remains in the lower black pot, likely a remnant of a previous specimen, but not identifiable as the registered species.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, appears to have high organic content but lacks moisture retention indicators.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments are present in the lower black pot, acting as a persistent anomaly.
biome_observations.surface_conditions: No moss or secondary sprouts observed. The desk surface is clear of debris.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t3: Initial state showed a single leaf in P3 and a single leaf in P4. P1 was already empty.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Minimal change; structural stability of the remaining leaves observed.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Slight postural shift in the P4 leaf; potential wilting.
temporal_deltas.current: Total collapse of P3 foliage. The biome has transitioned from 'struggling' to 'near-total loss'.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is suffering from extreme neglect or environmental stress. The loss of foliage in P3 and the absence of P1/P2/P4 specimens suggest a failure in the maintenance cycle. The remaining leaf in the lower pot is likely in its final stage of senescence.
anomalies: Eggshell fragments in the lower black pot (consistent across all frames).
Total disappearance of P3 Pothos leaf between T-1 and Current.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a catastrophic decline in the indoor biome. Starting from a state of minimal occupancy, the system has progressed to near-total failure. The Pothos (P3) has lost its last leaf, leaving only the rabbit anchor. The other pots are effectively barren, with only a single, dying leaf remaining in the lower black pot. The presence of eggshells suggests an unrecorded intervention, likely an attempt at soil amendment that failed to prevent the collapse.
